overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through a Louisiana bayou at night during a rainstorm. The character traverses a wooden walkway over swamp water, approaches a large plantation house with warm lantern light, and ends at a campfire with NPCs.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along wooden pier toward tree line

entered.detail: elevated wooden walkway with rope railings over dark water
lit gas lamp on wooden post casting warm orange light
lit gas lamp on wooden post casting warm orange light
tall cypress trees with spanish moss forming a dark wall at walkway end
dark still water visible beneath the wooden planks

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow wooden pier over swamp water at night, illuminated by warm gas lanterns. Tall cypress trees loom ahead as the character approaches the tree line.

events.description: heavy rain begins falling as character enters the cypress tree line

agents.ego_description: walking through dense cypress grove in heavy rainfall

entered.detail: large two-story wooden house with multiple lit windows visible through trees
thick swamp vegetation and ferns lining the path

segments.scene_description: Heavy rain begins as the character leaves the wooden pier and enters a dense cypress grove. A large plantation house with warm lights becomes visible through the trees ahead while rain streaks through the lantern light.

events.description: exits dense swamp trees into open lawn area surrounding plantation house

agents.ego_description: walking around the perimeter of the house observing the architecture and garden

entered.detail: circular stone fountain basin in the front garden
well-kept grass lawn surrounding the plantation house

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the swamp into an open lawn area surrounding a large wooden plantation house. The rain subsides slightly as the character walks past a stone fountain and views the house's detailed porch columns and balconies.

events.description: approaches campfire with seated NPCs near canvas tents

agents.ego_description: walking toward campfire and observing NPCs sitting around the fire

notable_agents.action: sitting in a chair by the campfire, facing the flames
sitting on a wooden crate near the fire

entered.detail: burning campfire with visible flames and glowing embers
canvas camping tent with interior lantern light

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a campsite with a burning fire where NPCs are seated in chairs. A canvas tent and wooden wagon are visible near the fire, while the plantation house remains lit in the background against the dark rainy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy Louisiana bayou that transitions from a secluded swamp path to the illuminated grounds of a plantation estate. It begins with the character walking along a narrow wooden pier over dark swamp water, guided by the warm glow of gas lanterns toward a looming line of cypress trees. As the character leaves the pier and enters the dense grove, heavy rain begins to streak through the light, partially obscuring a large plantation house that emerges in the distance. The scene then opens onto a wide lawn where the rain subsides slightly, allowing the camera to pass a stone fountain and reveal the detailed columns and balconies of the wooden manor. Finally, the movement leads toward a glowing campfire where NPCs are seated near a canvas tent and wagon, with the lit house remaining a backdrop against the dark, rainy night.
